headline: 104°F weekend inbound — tip blackberries, mulch tomatoes Friday.
weather_notes: Do all garden work before 8 AM through Sunday — 99°F Friday, 104°F Saturday, and 106°F Sunday under an active Extreme Heat Watch.
Run both zones Friday morning — today's watering will be 1 day dry by Friday's 99°F, the re-water threshold for heat above 85°F.
Check potato bag moisture daily Friday through Sunday — bags dry 2–3× faster than ground beds at 104–106°F.

surfaced_tasks.title: Tip new blackberry primocanes if 3–4 ft tall
surfaced_tasks.reason: Due tomorrow July 10 — tip before Friday's 99°F rises to Saturday's 104°F so new laterals aren't immediately hit by peak heat.

suggested_tasks.title: Mulch e1–e4 tomato beds before Saturday
suggested_tasks.description: Apply 2–3 inches of mulch to e1–e4 before Saturday's 104°F to protect 19-day root zones through the Extreme Heat Watch weekend.
